# BP-107 positive: typed middleware returns a handler that never delegates.
lang: go
file: BP-107-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

func auth(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if r.Header.Get("Authorization") == "" {
			return
		}
	})
}
